---
title: "Rhodopsin Alignment"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Reproducibility
set.seed(1)

############################################################
# 0) Clear R "brain" + libraries
############################################################
rm(list = ls())
gc()

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(lubridate)
  library(tibble)   # for glimpse()
  library(ggplot2)
})

############################################################
# 1) Set working directory (analysis folder)
############################################################
setwd("/SynologyDrive/PhD/Projects/SpringBloom2021/DataAnalysis_SpringBloom2021/Figure_05/Rhodopsin_Alignment/")


suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Biostrings)
  library(ggseqlogo)
  library(ggplot2)
})

## -------------------- 1) Input alignment --------------------
alignment_file <- "CarotenoidAntenna/Oligo_Rhodopsins.fasta.afa.best.fas"
```


# Oligo-like species rhodopsin alignment
```{r}
############################################################
## Monochrome AA frequency logo from an aligned FASTA (.afa)
## - Window: alignment columns win_start..win_end
## - y-axis: residue frequency (0..1)
## - NO chemistry colors, NO legend
## - Selectively color alignment columns:
##     blue:  101, 105, 112
##     green: 109
##     yellow:167
############################################################
library(Biostrings)
library(ggseqlogo)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

aa  <- readAAStringSet(alignment_file)
aln <- toupper(as.character(aa))

aln_len <- unique(nchar(aln))
if (length(aln_len) != 1) stop("Alignment must have identical sequence lengths (aligned FASTA).")
aln_len <- aln_len[1]

## -------------------- 2) Full window used to compute frequencies --------------------
win_start <- 153
win_end   <- 235

if (win_start < 1) stop("win_start must be >= 1.")
if (win_end > aln_len) stop("Window exceeds alignment length.")
if (win_end <= win_start) stop("win_end must be > win_start.")

window_seqs <- substr(aln, win_start, win_end)
win_len <- win_end - win_start + 1L

## -------------------- 3) Frequency matrix (AA x position) --------------------
AA20 <- c("A","C","D","E","F","G","H","I","K","L",
          "M","N","P","Q","R","S","T","V","W","Y")

chars_mat <- do.call(rbind, strsplit(window_seqs, "", fixed = TRUE))

freq <- matrix(0, nrow = length(AA20), ncol = win_len,
               dimnames = list(AA20, paste0("pos", seq_len(win_len))))

for (j in seq_len(win_len)) {
  col <- chars_mat[, j]
  col <- col[col != "-"]  # ignore gaps
  if (length(col) == 0) next
  counts <- table(factor(col, levels = AA20))
  freq[, j] <- as.numeric(counts) / sum(counts)
}

## -------------------- 4) Define selective coloring positions --------------------
to_window_pos <- function(alignment_pos) alignment_pos - win_start + 1L
in_window <- function(wpos) wpos >= 1 & wpos <= win_len

blue_align   <- c(157, 161, 168)
green_align  <- c(231)
yellow_align <- c(165)

blue_win   <- to_window_pos(blue_align);   blue_win   <- blue_win[in_window(blue_win)]
green_win  <- to_window_pos(green_align);  green_win  <- green_win[in_window(green_win)]
yellow_win <- to_window_pos(yellow_align); yellow_win <- yellow_win[in_window(yellow_win)]

## -------------------- 5) Build logo, extract polygons, recolor --------------------
p_base <- ggseqlogo(freq, method = "custom", seq_type = "aa", col_scheme = NULL)
pd <- ggplot_build(p_base)$data[[1]]

pd$pos <- as.integer(round(pd$x))
pd$fill <- "black"
pd$fill[pd$pos %in% blue_win]   <- "#1f77b4"
pd$fill[pd$pos %in% green_win]  <- "#2ca02c"
pd$fill[pd$pos %in% yellow_win] <- "#f1c40f"

## -------------------- 6) Define the two displayed regions --------------------
left_align_start  <- 153
left_align_end    <- 170

right_align_start <- 225
right_align_end   <- 235

left_win  <- to_window_pos(left_align_start:left_align_end)
right_win <- to_window_pos(right_align_start:right_align_end)

## -------------------- 7) Helper function to make one panel --------------------
make_logo_panel <- function(pd, keep_positions, axis_labels, show_y = TRUE) {
  pd_sub <- pd[pd$pos %in% keep_positions, ]

  # remap x positions so each subpanel starts at 1, 2, 3, ...
  pos_map <- setNames(seq_along(keep_positions), keep_positions)
  pd_sub$x_panel <- pd_sub$x - pd_sub$pos + unname(pos_map[as.character(pd_sub$pos)])
  pd_sub$pos_panel <- unname(pos_map[as.character(pd_sub$pos)])

  p <- ggplot(pd_sub) +
    geom_polygon(
      aes(x = x_panel, y = y, group = group, fill = fill),
      color = NA
    ) +
    scale_fill_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = seq_along(keep_positions),
      labels = axis_labels,
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, 1),
      breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = if (show_y) "Residue frequency" else NULL) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 7),
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 6)),
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 6))
    )

  if (!show_y) {
    p <- p +
      theme(
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
      )
  }

  p
}

## -------------------- 8) Build left and right panels --------------------
p_left <- make_logo_panel(
  pd = pd,
  keep_positions = left_win,
  axis_labels = left_align_start:left_align_end,
  show_y = TRUE
)

p_right <- make_logo_panel(
  pd = pd,
  keep_positions = right_win,
  axis_labels = right_align_start:right_align_end,
  show_y = FALSE
)

## -------------------- 9) Combine with a gap --------------------
p_final <- p_left + plot_spacer() + p_right +
  plot_layout(widths = c(length(left_win), 2.5, length(right_win))) &
  theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 5.5, 5.5, 5.5))

p_final <- p_final +
  plot_annotation(
    theme = theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text()
    )
  )

print(p_final)

## -------------------- 10) Export --------------------
ggsave("AA_logo_broken_axis.pdf", p_final, width = 18, height = 3)
```
